channel.title: cobalt; hydrolysis; kinetic study; langmuir-hinshelwood model; sodiumborohydride on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in cobalt; hydrolysis; kinetic study; langmuir-hinshelwood model; sodiumborohydride on LMI

item.title: Langmuir-Hinshelwood Kinetic Model To Capture The Cobaltnanoparticles-Catalyzed Hydrolysis Of Sodium Borohydride Over A Widetemperature Range
